title: Drakula Istanbul'da
writer: Turgut Demirag, Ümit Deniz, Mehmet Muhtar
actors: Annie Ball, Cahit Irgat, Ayfer Feray
plot: Azmi is a lawyer from Istanbul. Drakula of Romania has assumed a new title. Azmi travels to Romania for legal matters. He is warned of Drakula but Azmi is a strong believer of goodness.
